name: Warp Wood
identity: A magical item used by the shaman to strengthen wooden structures, allowing them to be reinforced or mended.
current_status: Present at the longhouse during construction, being considered for use by the shaman to reinforce joints and support the post-and-beam framework.

function.value: strengthen wooden structures, reinforce joints, or mend damage
